what_it_does: Defines a React `Button` function component that renders `<button>` by default (or `<a>` when given `href`, or a custom element via `as`) with a computed `cv-btn` className. Maps `variant`, `size`, `pill`, `block`, `icon` props to `cv-btn--<modifier>` classes, merges caller className, spreads remaining props, renders children.
observations: `variant` defaults to 'primary'; the 'default' value is treated as no modifier class (skipped).
Tag selection: `as` if provided, else `<a>` when `rest.href` is set, else `<button>`.
Uses `React.createElement` aliased to `h` (no JSX), with `/* global React */`.
Header comment: 'thin token-class wrapper over .cv-btn — every visual comes from design tokens, so it themes and recalibrates for free.'
Dual export (named + default), matching Badge/Card siblings.
standouts: Element inference: presence of `href` automatically switches rendering from `<button>` to `<a>`, a small polymorphism baked in.
conventions: Follows the project's thin-wrapper / token-class pattern (no styling in JS).
Mirrors Badge.jsx and Card.jsx structure exactly (same h alias, className idiom, dual export) — strong intra-folder consistency.
notes: The action primitive: ~25-line wrapper turning variant/size/pill/block/icon props into cv-btn classes, auto-rendering <a> when href is present.
questions: The .d.ts documents 'comm' and 'ink' variants; this file passes any variant string through generically — is the variant set validated anywhere or purely CSS-defined?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — header comment accurately states it is a thin token-class wrapper over .cv-btn rendering button/a.
intention_signals: Aims to provide a single button primitive whose every visual is a design token, so all buttons theme/recalibrate centrally, while still rendering semantically correct elements (a vs button).
novelty: Automatic <a>-vs-<button> inference from href within an otherwise purely class-mapping wrapper.
contribution: Contributes the action primitive's runtime: the variant/size/pill/block/icon → cv-btn class mapping and the button/a/as polymorphism logic.
summary_for_embedding: A React Button component that wraps the .cv-btn token class, mapping variant/size/pill/block/icon props to CSS modifiers and rendering <button>, <a> (when href), or a custom element.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a thin, theme-aware action button primitive whose visuals are fully token-driven while rendering the semantically correct element.
